creator: walter.von.entferndt@posteo.net
text:
When building KDE4 (4.10.5), the build stops due to some mismatch in net/kdenetwork4:

===>>> Creating a backup package for old version kdenetwork-4.10.5
tar: share/doc/HTML/en/kget/common: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: share/doc/HTML/en/kget/file.png: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: share/doc/HTML/en/kget/import_link.png: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: share/doc/HTML/en/kget/index.cache.bz2: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: share/doc/HTML/en/kget/index.docbook: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: share/doc/HTML/en/kget/kget_Advanced.png: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: share/doc/HTML/en/kget/kget_Appearance.png: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: share/doc/HTML/en/kget/kget_Network.png: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: share/doc/HTML/en/kget/kget_Web_Interface.png: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: share/doc/HTML/en/kget/kget_drop_target.png: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: share/doc/HTML/en/kget/kget_group.png: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: share/doc/HTML/en/kget/kget_groups.png: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: share/doc/HTML/en/kget/kget_plugins.png: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: share/doc/HTML/en/kget/kget_transfer_hostory.png: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: share/doc/HTML/en/kget/kget_verification.png: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: share/doc/HTML/en/kget/metalink0.png: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: share/doc/HTML/en/kget/metalink1.png: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: share/doc/HTML/en/kget/metalink2.png: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: share/doc/HTML/en/kget/metalink3.png: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.
pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256

===>>> Package creation failed for kdenetwork-4.10.5!

Fix: 

Build net/kdenetwork4 separately and select to ignore the error, then build x11/kde4 again
How-To-Repeat: # portmaster -Dg --packages-build --delete-build-only --packages-local=/usr/ports/packages x11/kde4
